problem: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed?
mechanism: Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy
hypothesis: Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy may resolve What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 26 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
